name: Changelog Manifest
summary: Conformance reference for a release's machine-readable change description — the dual of a prose CHANGELOG.md. Defines per-module entries (the unit is the module/file, not the package) keyed to a semver severity (major/minor/patch) and a Keep a Changelog / Conventional Commits change type, plus a migration linkage: a breaking entry references the codemod that mechanically applies it, with author + integrity-hash trust metadata so the auto-update pipeline can verify a migration before running it on consumer source. Release severity is derived strictest-wins from the entries, not hand-asserted. Borrows existing vocabulary (semver, Keep a Changelog, Conventional Commits) for the human layer; standardizes only the machine schema + migration linkage (the novel part). Consumed by the auto-update pipeline (#101), upgraders (#094), incremental delivery (#103), and MaaS versioning (#088).
